title: Copying a Widget to another Dashboard
excerpt:
Hi there, 
Is there a way to send a copy a widget you have set up on one dashboard to another dashboard, this would save alot of time updating different dashboards that I replicate across different business units (post i…

posts.author: MK1 (Michael Kresner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Is there a way to send a copy a widget you have set up on one dashboard to another dashboard, this would save alot of time updating different dashboards that I replicate across different business units (post initial template rollouts) as opposed to have to keep building them from the start again on each dashboard.

posts.author: JorgeLopez (Jorge Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Michael,
I don’t know how to do this but also would love to know if there is a way to get this done.

posts.author: HubertMarechal (Hubert Marechal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there!
I would also be very interested if we can do this!
We have several business units each with their dashboards and widgets
I would like to have one master dashboard with the duplicated widgets

posts.author: poovannan (Poovannan Dhakshinamoorthy)
posts.cookedHtml: This will be a great feature that will help Monday.com to be used efficiently in large scale deployments. Please consider adding this feature (i.e., ability to copy widgets from View to another View and from one Board to another).

posts.author: JoshWyatt (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding to the conversation that this would be a great add! Saving as a template has its flaws, as we need to input the data again. It would be great if we can copy a widget or move a widget from one dashboard to another.

posts.author: Sara413 (Sara Mahan)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be extremely helpful - especially transferring from one dashboard view to another dashboard view in the same board.
